description: As part of the initial planning, a developer needs to estimate the cost to decommission a wind farm at the end of its 25-year life.

nodes.task_description: Identify all required decommissioning activities, including turbine disassembly, foundation removal, and site restoration.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a comprehensive list of decommissioning tasks.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the cost for each activity based on industry benchmarks and the number of turbines.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides a line-item cost breakdown.

nodes.task_description: Estimate the potential salvage value from recycling steel and other components.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates a potential revenue offset from salvage.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the net decommissioning cost and the amount that needs to be set aside in a bond or fund.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the final net cost estimate.
